description: A marketer wants to send a promotion for a local event to all customers within a specific state.

nodes.task_description: Query the customer database for all customers whose shipping address is in 'California'.

expected_outcome.value: System generates a list of all customers in California.

nodes.task_description: Save the result as a new audience segment named 'California Customers'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully saves the new segment.
